title: Stacks (STX) Price Forecast & Scenarios
content: Analyzing Stacks (STX) requires a look at historical data and current market volatility. Over the last 30 days, STX saw a high of $0.269984 and a low of $0.234547, resulting in a change of -8.30%. The 1-year perspective is more dramatic, showing a high of $1.040099 and a low of $0.234547, reflecting a significant -62.18% move. | Metric | Value | | --- | --- | | 30-Day High | $0.269984 | | 30-Day Low | $0.234547 | | 1-Year High | $1.040099 | | 1-Year Low | $0.234547 | ## Technical Analysis of Support and Resistance The current price of $0.23077700 sits near the lower end of the 1-year range. A break below $0.234547 could signal a shift toward the all-time low of $0.04559639, while reclaiming the $0.534333 average 1-year price level is necessary for a shift in momentum. ## Comparison to Peer Assets Like [Filecoin](/filecoin) and [XRP](/ripple), Stacks is sensitive to broad market sentiment. While [XRP](/ripple) maintains higher liquidity, Stacks remains tied to [Bitcoin](/bitcoin)’s narrative, which currently commands a 58.1% market dominance. ## Market Cap Growth Scenarios Based on current data, a bearish scenario would see STX test deeper supports if market liquidity dries up. A base case involves consolidation within the $0.20-$0.30 range. A bullish scenario would require a surge in [Bitcoin](/bitcoin) L2 adoption, potentially re-testing the $0.50 level. ## Risk Factors Key factors include an 8/10 Risk Score and a high Volatility Index of 17. Investors should monitor BTC performance closely, as Stacks’ utility is inextricably linked to the [Bitcoin](/bitcoin) blockchain. *Disclaimer: This article is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Always do your own research (DYOR).*
